name: Observability
when_to_use: Wire/inspect traces, trajectories, drift and cost monitoring for a running agent

name: Optimization loop
when_to_use: Stand up the trace-and-eval flywheel; score loop readiness; convert traces to evals

name: Autonomous controller
when_to_use: Gate and operate an autonomous-improvement controller with circuit-breakers

name: Cost and reliability
when_to_use: Set cost/iteration budgets, reliability targets, and a decomposed release gate

name: Maturity and governance
when_to_use: Place on the maturity ladder, set provenance/governance, and route work to siblings
